rows.label: tev000792_MSG0001
rows.name: Hey, it's [ST:playername ]![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000792_MSG0002
rows.name:
I was just asking the nice lady
here to pull together some extra
first-aid kits for us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000792_MSG0003
rows.name:
My next mission could involve
run-ins with a pair of
Overeds—possibly at the same time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000792_MSG0004
rows.name:
And if we end up in a tough fight, we're
likely to suffer multiple injuries.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000792_JNK0010
rows.name: Envy

rows.label: tev000792_SEL0011
rows.name:
Say you're jealous of the
exciting battle that awaits him.

rows.label: tev000792_JNK0020
rows.name: Aid

rows.label: tev000792_SEL0021
rows.name: Offer to come along and help out.

rows.label: tev000792_JNK0030
rows.name: Admire

rows.label: tev000792_SEL0031
rows.name:
Praise Doug about his
concern for his comrades.

rows.label: tev000792_MSG0005
rows.name: Wow. You really are one of a kind.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000792_MSG0006
rows.name:
Even the Avalanche are quaking in
their boots, and I can't say I'm
brimming with confidence either.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000792_MSG0007
rows.name:
I don't know anyone who's as perfectly
suited to being a BLADE as you. It's
like you were born to do it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000792_MSG0008
rows.name:
Part of me wishes I could stand back
and let you lead the charge, but we
have our own pride to think about.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000792_MSG0009
rows.name:
So I'm going to handle this—and I'm
coming back without a single fatality![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000792_MSG0010
rows.name:
There's a pretty sweet paycheck waiting
for us at the end of all this, so next
time I see you, dinner's on me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000792_MSG0011
rows.name: Well, I've got to get going.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000792_MSG0012
rows.name:
Thanks for lighting a fire
under me, though. I'm suddenly
in the mood for a fight.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000792_MSG0013
rows.name:
Oh, I don't think we
need to go that far.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000792_MSG0014
rows.name:
I have my job to do,
and you've got yours.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000792_MSG0015
rows.name:
I'm grateful that you'd look out for us like that,
but it isn't right to let you carry the whole
weight of BLADE's mission on your shoulders.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000792_MSG0016
rows.name:
You have to trust that
I can handle this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000792_MSG0017
rows.name:
Of course, if it all goes horribly wrong, we'll
call for reinforcements. In that case, you
might get a chance to help out after all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000792_MSG0018
rows.name: Oh, that reminds me...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000792_MSG0019
rows.name:
I've got the mission under control,
but there's something else that
I could use your help with.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000792_MSG0020
rows.name:
It's a significantly greater threat than the mission I
just told you about. It might not even be an exaggeration
to say that it concerns the fate of humanity itself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000792_MSG0021
rows.name: What I'm talking about is...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000792_MSG0022
rows.name:
The development of the
Doll flight module![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000792_MSG0023
rows.name:
There aren't enough replacement Blue
Bloods in the world for me to survive
these field tests Lin's running.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000792_MSG0024
rows.name:
...What? Hey, I thought you wanted
to help! Don't blow me off now![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000792_MSG0025
rows.name:
Hey, listen! I'm being
serious here. Er, [ST:playername ]...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000792_MSG0026
rows.name:
That's hardly something you
should be praising me for.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000792_MSG0027
rows.name:
I know all of us have a moral duty
to serve the whole of humanity, but
I can't wrap my head around that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000792_MSG0028
rows.name: It's just way too much to process.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000792_MSG0029
rows.name:
What I CAN wrap my head around
are the comrades fighting by my
side—and I include you in that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000792_MSG0030
rows.name:
So I'm going to do everything I
can to aid and protect them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000792_MSG0031
rows.name:
And hopefully, in doing so, I'll
be serving humanity as a whole.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000792_MSG0032
rows.name:
But let's be honest—I'm not looking
too far beyond the friends beside me
and the balance in my bank account.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000792_MSG0033
rows.name:
And really, looking out for your friends
is the least any of us could do.[ST:wait ]
